name: Adata 16GB (1x16GB) 5600MHz C46 DDR5 Desktop Ram
description: The future of DRAM is here in the form of the ADATA DDR5-5600 U-DIMM module. Compared to its predecessors, this module provides a significant speed boost, higher capacities, reduced power consumption, and increased bandwidth per CPU core. CAS Latency: CL 46 Higher Frequencies Built-in Power Management IC On-Die Error Correcting Code
